pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh line 13 which sets PORTFOLIO_FILE to this exact path, and confirmed via live environment SSH that the file exists at this path after task setup.
Matches <name>NVIDIA Corp</name> in setup_task.sh XML heredoc (line 35). Confirmed in live environment: PP shows 'NVIDIA Corp' in the securities list.

ISIN checksum validated via Luhn algorithm (sum=50, 50%10=0). Confirmed as NVIDIA Corporation's official ISIN via ISIN.org (https://www.isin.org/isin-preview/?isin=US67066G1040), Fidelity, Vienna Stock Exchange, and NVIDIA's own SEC filings on EDGAR.

NVIDIA executed a 10-for-1 forward stock split. Confirmed via NVIDIA's Q1 FY2025 earnings press release (https://nvidianews.nvidia.com/news/nvidia-announces-financial-results-for-first-quarter-fiscal-2025), SEC 8-K filing (nvda-20240607.htm), and Vienna Stock Exchange announcement.

June 10, 2024 was the ex-date (first day of split-adjusted trading). Record date was June 6, distribution June 7 after close. Confirmed via Vienna Stock Exchange announcement (https://www.wienerborse.at/en/news/vienna-stock-exchange-news/nvidia-stock-split-06102024/) and SEC 8-K filing.
Setup XML has NVIDIA BUY with <shares>1000000000</shares>. PP encoding: 1000000000 / 10^8 = 10.0 shares. Confirmed in live environment: PP shows 10 NVIDIA shares in the Statement of Assets view.
Mathematical derivation: 10 pre-split shares × 10 (split ratio) = 100 post-split shares. Consistent with NVIDIA's 10-for-1 split mechanics.
Matches <name>Allianz SE</name> in setup_task.sh XML heredoc (line 54). Confirmed in live environment: PP shows 'Allianz SE' in the securities list.

ISIN checksum validated via Luhn algorithm (valid). Confirmed as Allianz SE's official ISIN via Allianz IR page (https://www.allianz.com/en/investor_relations/share/share-information.html), Euronext (https://live.euronext.com/en/product/equities/DE0008404005-XPAR), and Vienna Stock Exchange.

Allianz FY2023 dividend ex-date was May 9, 2024. AGM approval was May 8, 2024; payment date was May 13, 2024. Ex-date confirmed via StockAnalysis.com (https://stockanalysis.com/quote/fra/ALV/dividend/) and DividendMax (https://www.dividendmax.com/germany/frankfurt-stock-exchange/life-insurance/allianz-se/dividends). The ex-date is the standard date used in portfolio tracking software.

Allianz FY2023 dividend was EUR 13.80 per share (confirmed via Allianz official dividend page: https://www.allianz.com/en/investor_relations/share/dividend.html and AGM agenda). Portfolio holds 15 shares (XML: <shares>1500000000</shares> / 10^8 = 15). Gross = 15 * EUR 13.80 = EUR 207.00 = 20700 cents. Note: EUR 11.40 was the FY2022 dividend, NOT FY2023.

German withholding tax rate is 26.375% (25% Kapitalertragsteuer + 5.5% Solidaritaetszuschlag on the 25% = 25% + 1.375% = 26.375%). Confirmed via PwC Tax Summaries Germany (https://taxsummaries.pwc.com/germany/corporate/withholding-taxes). Tax = 26.375% * EUR 207.00 = EUR 54.59625, rounded to nearest cent = EUR 54.60 = 5460 cents.
Task design choice - this is the taxonomy name the agent should create. Not a factual claim about external data. Internally consistent with the task description.

Task design choice defining the taxonomy hierarchy. The agent should create 'Equity' parent with 'Growth' and 'Dividend Income' children. Internally consistent with task description and taxonomy_assignments.
Task design choice defining the taxonomy hierarchy. The agent should create 'Fixed Income' parent with 'Bonds' child. Internally consistent.

Task design choice defining security-to-category assignments. All security names match the XML exactly (verified: NVIDIA Corp, Allianz SE, iShares Core EUR Corp Bond UCITS ETF, Vanguard FTSE All-World UCITS ETF). Vanguard split weights sum to 100% (70+30=100). PP stores weights as integers where 10000=100%, so 70% = 7000, 30% = 3000. Internally consistent.

privileged_info_summary: The portfolio file managed_portfolio.xml is pre-loaded with 4 securities in EUR base currency: NVIDIA Corp (ISIN US67066G1040, 10 shares bought at EUR 815.00 on 2024-03-15), Allianz SE (ISIN DE0008404005, 15 shares at EUR 248.30), Vanguard FTSE All-World UCITS ETF (ISIN IE00B3RBWM25, 80 shares at EUR 115.40), and iShares Core EUR Corp Bond UCITS ETF (ISIN IE00B3F81R35, 100 shares at EUR 99.85). The deposit account is named 'Verrechnungskonto' (EUR, EUR 50,000 initial deposit) and the securities account is 'Wertpapierdepot'. The agent must complete three operations: (1) Record NVIDIA's 10-for-1 stock split with ex-date June 10, 2024 — this is a real corporate event; PP stores splits as <stock-split> elements under <events> in the security node, with the ratio stored as an integer (10 or 10*10^8=1000000000). (2) Record Allianz SE's FY2023 dividend on 2024-05-09 (ex-date): EUR 13.80/share * 15 shares = EUR 207.00 gross, with 26.375% German withholding tax = EUR 54.60. PP stores dividends as account-transactions of type DIVIDENDS with GROSS_VALUE and TAX units in cents (20700 and 5460). (3) Create a hierarchical taxonomy 'Asset Allocation' with parent categories 'Equity' (children: 'Growth', 'Dividend Income') and 'Fixed Income' (child: 'Bonds'). Assign NVIDIA to Growth (100%), Allianz to Dividend Income (100%), iShares Corp Bond to Bonds (100%), and Vanguard to Growth (70%) + Dividend Income (30%). PP stores taxonomy weights as integers where 10000=100%. The file must be saved (Ctrl+S or File>Save) for changes to persist to the XML.
